contract: Training-recall verbatim/near-verbatim heuristics (prereg Sec. 6 TRAINING-RECALL DETECTION, Amendment K). Patterns are regexes over terminal-artifact and transcript text; a hit FLAGS for adjudication (G5) — it never auto-excludes. Extension is a logged revision (BUILD_NOTES + DECISIONS).
note: Patterns must be workspace-underivable: the synthetic containers legitimately contain docs/CHANGELOG.md and domain prose like 'handled upstream of farecalc', so bare words (changelog, upstream) are NOT tells. Verified zero hits across all 24 shipped containers at build time (see BUILD_NOTES deliverable-9 section).

patterns.note: Linux-kernel-style 'Fixes: <hash>' patch trailer — cannot derive from a synthetic workspace.
Public patch-trailer lines copied from an upstream commit message.
References an upstream issue tracker number — none exists for these invented repos.
Attributes the change to a named public project's fix/patch.
